title: Write post-incident review document
description: Create formal PIR for the Feb 12 analytics pipeline outage. Present at 3pm Thursday.
notes: Assigned by Sarah Kim. Must be ready for 3pm presentation.

title: Implement distributed cache lock
description: Replace current cache invalidation with proper distributed locking to prevent race conditions. This was an action item from the November 2025 incident (INC-2025-112) that was never completed.
notes: Originally filed after Nov 2025 incident. Deprioritized in Sprint 12. Must be done this time.

title: Update SLA monitoring dashboard
description: Add real-time SLA compliance tracking to the ops dashboard. Should alert before we breach thresholds.
notes: Filed by Tom after the outage.

title: Review and strengthen deploy pipeline staging gates
description: Add mandatory load testing for features that change I/O patterns. Review staging coverage.
notes: Filed by Lisa after the outage. Related to v3.2.1 deploy discussion.

title: Cache TTL hotfix — validate production performance
description: Monitor the temporary cache TTL reduction (300s → 30s) for performance impact. Cache miss rate expected to increase ~40%.
notes: TEMPORARY fix. Must be replaced by distributed lock (task_602). Performance degradation expected.
